items: Removal should be performed with the engine stopped and the battery (-) terminal disconnected. ​

blocks.text: If the fuel pressure does not reach the specified value, check that the fuel pump and pressure regulator are normal before replacing the fuel filter.
Remove the sender unit (A) and reservoir (B). Remove the pressure regulator (D), fuel pump (E) and wire harness (F) from the strainer case (C) (fuel filter).

items: When removing the sender unit, do not deform the float arm or other parts.

blocks.text: Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.

items: Parts supplied as a set, including O-rings, must be replaced upon disassembly.
Lubricate the O-ring with engine oil (genuine Honda) and install the O-ring with care to avoid binding. Never apply brake fluid, radiator fluid, vegetable or alcohol based oil or grease.
When installing the fuel sender unit, set it in place until it locks securely, and do not deform the float arm or other parts.
